name: Mounds Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine the cake mix and milk. Stir until well mixed.
3. Add the sugar to the mixture and stir until combined.
4. Gently fold in the marshmallows until evenly distributed.
5. Pour the mixture into a greased baking dish.
6. Sprinkle the shredded coconut over the top of the batter.
7. Bake for 30-35 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow the cake to cool completely before serving.
